name: arm-media-planning-os
description: ARM Media Planning OS — AI-powered media planning, forecasting, and recommendation workspace for agency teams.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=server && npm run typecheck --workspace=web
